method: exact dot-product over committed doc embeddings
note: Index holds 1,000,000 passages with 100.0% of dev qrels gold passages present. When coverage is 100%, all dev queries are answerable and naive == answerable-only recall. When coverage is low, naive all-query recall is capped by coverage (a corpus-size artifact, not model quality) — use the answerable-only figure for model quality. Recall is over the full index.
